dialogue.speaker: OWAIS
dialogue.line: "Gentlemen, please fasten your seatbelts. We're experiencing turbulent weather."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of OWAIS, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Come on, Owais, lighten up. We're not going to crash."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Owais, a hint of annoyance on his face.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Yeah, I've flown in worse conditions. This is nothing."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of Sam, a smirk on his face.

dialogue.speaker: AREEBA
dialogue.line: "Pilot, I've been told to inform you that we're approaching our cruising altitude. All passengers are seated and buckled up."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of Leo, a confident smile on his face.

dialogue.speaker: OWAIS
dialogue.line: "Thank you, Areeba. Please keep an eye on these gentlemen. I don't want any trouble."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Areeba, a warm smile on her face.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Trouble? What are you talking about, Owais? We're just trying to enjoy the flight."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of Owais, a stern look on his face.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Yeah, and I'm starting to think this plane doesn't have any turbulence at all."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Sam, a raised eyebrow.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "See, I told you it was nothing. This is just a little bump."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Yeah, and Owais is just being a buzzkill. He needs to relax."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Leo, a triumphant grin on his face.

dialogue.speaker: OWAIS
dialogue.line: "That's it. I've had enough of your nonsense. Leo, Sam, please report to the cockpit immediately."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of Sam, a chuckling expression.

dialogue.speaker: AREEBA
dialogue.line: "Gentlemen, please follow the pilot's instructions. We need to secure the plane."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Owais, a firm jawline.

dialogue.speaker: OWAIS
dialogue.line: "You two are a menace. I'm going to have to sedate you if you don't behave."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of OWAIS, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Sedate us? You can't do that. We're paying customers."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Owais, a hint of anger in his voice.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Yeah, and I'm not going to calm down just because you're being a party pooper."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of Sam, a defiant expression.

dialogue.speaker: AREEBA
dialogue.line: "Pilot, I've secured the passengers. They're safely buckled in and calm."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of Leo, a challenging look on his face.

dialogue.speaker: OWAIS
dialogue.line: "Good. I'm going to have to rely on Areeba to keep an eye on you two. Stay out of trouble."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Areeba, a reassuring smile on her face.

characters.name: OWAIS
characters.personality: OWAIS is a no-nonsense, authoritative figure who values order and discipline, but also has a compassionate side as seen in his interactions with Areeba.
characters.appearance: OWAIS is a middle-aged man with a stern expression, dressed in a crisp airline uniform, complete with a white shirt and tie.
characters.style_reference: A 1970s-era disaster film, think 'Airport' (1970) or 'The Poseidon Adventure' (1972), with a focus on earthy tones and practical effects.
